subject: Fermi GBM trigger 478156376/16022621 is not a GRB
body:
E.Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 478156376/16022621
at 05:12:52.31 UT on 26 February 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to particle activity."
